settings.title: Takumi Craftsmanship
settings.description: Each Beres 10 driver is hand-finished by master Takumi craftsmen in Sakata, Japan — a tradition of artistry that no machine can replicate.

settings.title: Edo Kiriko Inspiration
settings.description: Intricate patterns inspired by traditional Edo Kiriko glass-cutting techniques adorn every club, making Beres 10 a true work of art.

settings.title: Effortless Power & Precision
settings.description: Advanced materials engineering beneath the artisan exterior delivers effortless power, balance, and precision for the discerning golfer.

settings.title: Honma Beres 10
settings.hero_eyebrow: Handcrafted in Sakata. Available at Northcrest.
settings.hero_sub2: Available at Northcrest Golf · Atlanta, GA
settings.intro_body: Honma's Beres 10 series represents the tenth generation of Japan's most revered golf club collection. Hand-finished by master Takumi craftsmen in Sakata, each club blends traditional artistry inspired by Edo Kiriko glass-cutting techniques with advanced materials engineered for effortless power and precision. Northcrest is honored to present this exceptional collection.
settings.excl_text: For over 65 years, Honma has crafted the world's most luxurious golf equipment in their Sakata studio. The Beres collection has long been recognized globally as the choice of golfers who value craftsmanship at its most elevated level. Northcrest offers personalized guidance to help you experience the refinement, balance, and performance that define Beres 10.
settings.cta_sub: Schedule a private consultation with our team. Discover the ease, balance, and precision that define Honma's newest flagship series.
settings.collection_sub: Select a club below to learn more
